name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BG288, Miu's new Isetan limited tote bag, main item on the official website, an absolute hit🔥 this year. Top-grade imported calfskin, fine and smooth leather surface, premium texture, soft yet structured body. The small size design is more refined, with a casual and lazy temperament. 100% head-turner for daily wear. Hand-stitched leather logo on the surface, brand new linen lining inside, two zippered pockets, adjustable leather shoulder strap. Dimensions 22X 14X11Cm, comes with original packaging.
